name: achillea millefolium
title: achillea millefolium benefits
description: Achillea millefolium aids in detox by promoting the elimination of toxins and waste products from the body, thereby supporting the body's natural detoxification processes. This benefit is important because it can help prevent a range of health issues, including digestive problems, skin conditions, and fatigue, which can be caused by the buildup of toxins in the body.
